description: Create kernel/workflow_bridge.py to map skill workflow phases (idea_phase, requirements_phase, execution_phase, quality_phase, design_phase, lifecycle_phase) to graph nodes (init, plan, code, test, review, reflect, evolve). Update skill_selector to use workflow phase for selection. Add phase_transitions tracking to state.
steps: Create kernel/workflow_bridge.py with class WorkflowBridge that: (a) defines PHASE_TO_NODES mapping (idea_phase -> [init,plan], requirements_phase -> [plan], execution_phase -> [code,test], quality_phase -> [review,reflect], design_phase -> [plan,code], lifecycle_phase -> [reflect,evolve]), (b) has get_current_phase(current_node) -> str method, (c) has get_skills_for_phase(phase, skill_index) -> list[str] that returns skills from the workflow section of _index.yaml for that phase, (d) has get_recommended_phase(goal, state) -> str that suggests which phase to start from based on goal vagueness, (e) has record_phase_transition(state, from_phase, to_phase) -> None
Update kernel/skill_selector.py: add a new function select_skills_for_phase(phase: str, skill_index: dict) -> list[str] that reads the workflow section and returns all skills for that phase

Create tests/test_workflow_bridge.py with comprehensive tests: phase mapping correctness, get_current_phase for each node, skills_for_phase loading, phase transitions recording, edge cases (unknown nodes, empty phases)
Run tests to confirm everything passes
acceptance_criteria: All graph nodes map to at least one skill workflow phase
select_skills_for_phase returns correct skills for each phase from _index.yaml workflow section
Phase transitions are tracked in state dict
All new tests pass with coverage >= 90%
findings: All 54 new tests pass. Full suite 690 tests pass with 98.96% coverage. Fixed word-boundary issue in get_recommended_phase where 'ui' substring in 'build' caused false positive - switched action and design marker checks to use word-level (split-based) matching with action markers checked first.
